community.seo_description: ZJU AI community: help, tech sharing, news, and collaboration.
community.header_blurb: Sections will load from the agreed storage mapping; this is the routing and API shell.
community.section_placeholder: The “{{section}}” area is being wired up; final content will match this structure.
community.composer_toast_pending: Posting will open after the data model and permissions are confirmed.
community.write_path_pending: Section-to-storage mapping (e.g. articles + tags) is pending product sign-off (OpenSpec task 2.4).
community.tech_preview_hint: Sample of published articles (GET /api/articles); tag filters per section come after mapping.
community.help_hero_lead: Tag help posts for searchability; future flow will suggest past threads before opening a new one. The list below mirrors the local UI prototype until the API is wired.
community.tag_bar_hint: Multi-select means OR (preview only); real filters will align with GET /api/articles.
community.demo_1_title: CUDA vs PyTorch mismatch — nvrtc error in training
community.demo_2_title: Official Q&A: Agent tool timeouts and retries
community.demo_3_title: Are campus compute pool priorities fair?
community.demo_4_title: Host driver matches container but CUDA still errors
community.preview_data_note: Sample rows match your local prototype; real threads will come from the API with tag search and compose.
community.tech_hero_lead: Articles from the platform library; per-section tag filters land after the storage mapping is approved.
community.tag_bar_strategy_html: With multiple tags selected, rows match any tag (preview); production filters will match API params.
community.rules_p1: Use real identity or approved anonymity; no harassment, discrimination, or personal attacks.
community.rules_p2: For help posts, include environment details (OS, framework versions, full error or minimal repro).
community.rules_p3: Cite sources for quotes and copies; no illegal, infringing, or unsolicited commercial spam.
community.rules_p4: Moderators may hide violations; repeat offenders may be limited or banned.
community.rules_p5_html: The official notice page is authoritative; this is a short summary placeholder.
community.podcast_aria_orb: Podcast minimized; tap or press Enter to expand, drag vertically
community.sb_pulse_note: Illustrative stats; production will use analytics APIs.

hero.title: CAPTURE
hero.subtitle: Freezing moments in time, creating eternity through the lens.
hero.zju_subtitle: Bridge information gaps and build a shared campus network
hero.zju_badge: Digital Art / Tech Community / Campus Co-Creation

about.title: Capturing life's
about.subtitle: fleeting moments.
about.p1: I'm a visual storyteller based in Tokyo. With over a decade of experience behind the lens, I strive to find beauty in the mundane and the extraordinary alike. My work explores the intersection of light, shadow, and human emotion.
about.p2: Whether it's the neon-lit streets of a metropolis or the serene silence of a mountain peak, I bring a unique perspective to every shot.

ecosystem.meta_desc: Learn how TUOTU ZJU connects universities, companies, and students through real enterprise briefs, campus AI community, and technical hackathons.

hero.strong: Real briefs, practical projects, shared recognition.
hero.desc: Students learn by building, companies see talent earlier, and campus innovation gains a path into real industry scenarios.

brief.desc: Companies release real briefs, students produce outcomes through practice, and campus plus enterprise partners complete recognition and recommendation.

handles.events_desc: Gather events, projects, enterprise briefs, and learning resources into one AI opportunity entry point.
handles.community_desc: Connect learners, developers, and student organization leads, turning discussion into long-term co-creation.
handles.hackathon_desc: Real enterprise briefs, timed technical sprints, and no-pitch judging directly validate hard skills.

engine.desc: The resource entry gathers opportunities, the AI community carries collaboration, and the technical hackathon validates capability at high density. Together, they turn AI momentum into an operable and repeatable talent development mechanism.

loop.gather_desc: Events, projects, and enterprise briefs enter one hub
loop.practice_desc: Students learn by doing in competitions and projects
loop.recognize_desc: Campus and companies endorse proven capability
loop.channel_desc: Strong talent moves toward internships and referrals

support.desc: Campus units provide scenarios and mechanisms, student organizations carry people and execution, and enterprise partners bring real briefs, technical resources, and talent pathways.
support.school_desc: The Future Learning Center and campus innovation platforms prepare scenarios, spaces, and operating mechanisms so enterprise briefs can steadily enter campus practice.
support.student_desc: Leading tech clubs and core organizers carry activities, projects, and practice communities so campus momentum keeps moving.
support.enterprise_desc: Leading AI companies bring real briefs, models, cloud, and tools into campus, helping ideas become runnable outcomes.

foundation.scenario_desc: Real tasks enter the campus site
foundation.coordination_desc: Space, people, and execution move together

game.default_desc: Immerse yourself in the environment. React to elements and capture the essence of the moment.

footer.description: Exploring digital art, interactive media, and creative coding. Pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the browser.
footer.connect_text: Interested in collaborating? Let's build something amazing together.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} AI Ecosystem Team. All rights reserved.

home.meta_desc: Explore the latest photos, music, videos, and articles.

stats.snapshot_title: Content, visits, and engagement shape the platform's strength curve
stats.snapshot_desc: What you see here is the platform's real accumulation of traffic, published works, and user feedback working together as proof of momentum.

platform.stat_user_base_hint: Supports event reach, community connections, and project conversion
platform.stat_service_chain_hint: Information publishing, community collaboration, scenario access, and practice validation
platform.stat_sprint_hint: Helps topics become prototype outcomes quickly
platform.handle_events_desc: Publish campus AI events, enterprise topics, project calls, and learning resources from one entry point.
platform.handle_community_desc: Connect learners, developers, student organizations, and project leads for ongoing exchange and collaboration.
platform.handle_learning_desc: Open real learning scenarios and interdisciplinary topics with space, coordination, and long-term operations.
platform.handle_hackathon_desc: Run timed builds and reviews around enterprise topics to validate AI-native development capability.
platform.ecosystem_desc: The platform connects students, campus support units, and enterprise partners around AI events, community co-creation, real briefs, and practice competitions.
platform.engine_desc: The homepage keeps four actionable entries: discover first, connect next, enter real scenarios, then validate outcomes through timed practice.
platform.resources_desc: Campus support units provide scenarios, spaces, and organization. Student groups drive reach and execution. Enterprise partners bring real briefs, technology, and outcome pathways.
platform.student_orgs_desc: Responsible for reach, operations, collaboration, and review so AI practice communities keep gathering.
platform.enterprise_desc: Provide real briefs, model capabilities, cloud resources, and outcome evaluation so prototypes can be tested.
platform.resource_chain: Resources are not a sponsor wall; they form a scenario - people - technology - competition conversion chain.
platform.live_desc: The last homepage section returns from platform narrative to real content users can click, join, and follow.

hackathon.meta_desc: {{title}} - {{subtitle}}. Build a runnable AI app independently within the time limit.

hero.subtitle: 5 hours · solo · no pitch deck
hero.description: Build a runnable AI application independently within a limited time. AI tools are allowed; no concept packaging, only real working products.

board.description: Turn an idea into a runnable AI app on site. The rules are direct: solo build, AI native, product first.

rules.ai_native_text: Codex, Claude, Cursor, Trae, and similar tools are encouraged for full-stack development.
rules.five_hours_text: Build an AI app that runs, can be experienced, and explains a real problem.
rules.no_pitch_text: No presentation packaging. Judging focuses on completion, real experience, and originality.

form.section_desc: Submit your basic information. Event updates will be sent through follow-up channels.

form.official_group_desc: Scan to join the group. Follow-up notices and on-site updates will be shared there.

coach.status_idle_detail: Describe your background and concerns to get an actionable plan.

events.title: Community Events
events.subtitle: Join our latest activities and workshops
events.no_upcoming_desc: No upcoming events for now. Please check back later.

filter.sheet_hint: Type and audience filters apply immediately.
filter.category_hint: Choose a type first, then narrow by audience.
filter.audience_hint: Choose a college/program or keep All Campus.

assistant.mode_filters_hint: Manual filters stay the default, with AI search as a secondary path.
assistant.title: Describe the event you want in one sentence
assistant.subtitle: I will start with public upcoming events. If there are none, you can decide whether to widen the search to ongoing or past events.
assistant.embedded_title: Try finding events with natural language
assistant.embedded_subtitle: Describe the theme, timing, or payoff you want and I will first search across public upcoming events.
assistant.empty_no_upcoming: There are no upcoming events right now.
assistant.empty_no_matches: Nothing in this scope feels especially close to your request yet.
assistant.empty_unreliable: The AI response did not look reliable this time, or there may not be any events that fit your request yet. Try rephrasing it.
assistant.empty_after_clarify: I still could not narrow it down confidently this time. Try rephrasing your request.
assistant.unreliable_hint: You can try a more specific request, or relax some constraints and try again.
assistant.unavailable: The event AI assistant is unavailable right now.
assistant.timeout: The event AI assistant timed out. Please try again soon.
assistant.error: The event AI assistant hit a snag. Please try again.
assistant.input_placeholder: For example: I want an in-person event this weekend for freshmen, ideally with credits or volunteer hours
assistant.clarification_placeholder: Add one more detail and I will keep narrowing it down.
assistant.clarification_hint: This is the one clarification turn. I will give results next.
assistant.helper: Recommendations stay lightweight: just a few activities and one short reason each.
assistant.expand_hint: If you want, I can keep looking through ongoing or past events.
assistant.empty_hint: Try rephrasing your request or loosening a few constraints.
assistant.expand_button: Look through ongoing or past events
assistant.detail_error: Failed to load event details. Please try again.
assistant.panel_title: Tell me what you want to join, and I will match it against your profile and the event pool
assistant.panel_subtitle: Mention topic, campus, audience, credits, or volunteer hours. After login, I can also learn from your organization, saved events, registrations, and feedback.
assistant.profile_auth_hint: Log in to save a long-term profile. For now, you can still describe your preferences in this request.

freshman_offline.label: Freshman Offline
freshman_offline.prompt: Recommend offline events suitable for freshmen, ideally near Zijingang campus

credit_volunteer.label: Credits / Volunteer
credit_volunteer.prompt: Recommend events that mention credits or volunteer hours

portfolio.label: Skill Portfolio
portfolio.prompt: Recommend hands-on events that improve skills and can become portfolio work

ai_lecture.label: AI Lectures
ai_lecture.prompt: I want AI, technology, innovation, or entrepreneurship lectures

this_week.label: This Week
this_week.prompt: What events can I join this week or very soon?

assistant.historical_fallback_note: I checked upcoming and ongoing events first, then fell back to past events when there were not enough close matches. These are better as leads for similar future opportunities.
assistant.narrow_hint: Still not close enough? Add a sentence above, such as ?Zijingang only?, ?no past events?, or ?better for freshmen?, and I will narrow it down.

toast.feedback_down: Saved: I will reduce similar recommendations
toast.feedback_login_required: Log in to let the assistant remember feedback
toast.feedback_failed: Failed to save feedback. Please try again later.
toast.profile_login_required: Log in to save recommendation preferences
